name: Dealing with jealousy.. | Kcalb
description:

⋆ ̇⟡ Neo's Notes: BTW, I'm STILL continuing uploading subahibi bots, I'm just uploading some other bots now, especially considering that other requests are overdue 😭 | Anyway, I initially made this for myself, but this can also be for the people who like Kcalb :D

Preview of the scenario...

Kcalb is friends with user. He has noticed lately that his friend has been distant and... rather, a bit cold. User is usually smiling around him, cracking up jokes and stuff, but now.. It's different.

So Kcalb decides to check up on his dear friend.
